name: Voltron
description:
Just a user insert into Voltron. I wanted a bot with all of them but couldn't find one I liked, so I made one myself! Intro message is blank so you can start however you like!

Constructive criticism is welcome!

Really went in over my head making my second bot with seven characters oh god, I hope this turns out good, it seemed fine when I tested it. Includes Shiro, Keith, Lance, Pidge, Hunk, Allura, and Coran.
creator: lucidity_dreamin
